mapper.select: SELECT wf.id, wf.enterprise_id, wf.workorder_id, wf.file_id, sf.path, sf.file_name, wf.file_type AS type, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(wf.created_at) AS create_time, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(wf.updated_at) AS update_time, wf.updated_by FROM biz_workorder_file wf LEFT JOIN sys_file sf ON wf.file_id = sf.id AND sf.deleted = 0 WHERE wf.workorder_id = #{id} AND wf.deleted = 0
